warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills: 5-8min
1 round:
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Broad Jumps
2 Rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
3 Full Snatch
5 OH Squat
0530 specific warm up
10 Band Row, Rotate, Press
10 Scap Pull Ups
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
100m run
5 Kip Swings
5 Pull Ups
2 reps at weights warming up to metcon weight.

strength.name: Hang Power Snatch
strength.description:
1x3 | 1x3
E2MOM 12min
Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 3
02:00 3
04:00 3
06:00 3
08:00 3
10:00 3

strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
4x6 | * 3 sec Down, 2 sec Pause
*Keep Quads engaged at all times.
*Think Break & Pull apart Bar | E3MOM 18 mins
BUILD 2x6
00:00 5 @ 50%
03:00 5 @ 60%
HOLD 4x5
06:00 5 @ 70%
09:00 5 @ 70%
12:00 5 @ 70%
15:00 5 @ 70%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
3 Rounds for time
5 Hang Power Snatches @ 60/40kg
10 Pull ups
200m Run
Rest 1 minute
Time is  when you finish your last run.
Scale Pull ups to Jumping Pull ups x 5 or Ring Rows
RX+ @ 70/45

hypertrophy.reasoning: Address posterior chain imbalances and horizontal pulling weakness while avoiding fatigue accumulation on snatches and pressing patterns.

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Hang Power Snatch, 1 by 3. Strength: Bench Press, 4 by 6 at 70 percent. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 5 Hang Power Snatches @ 60/40kg, 10 Pull ups, 200m Run, Time is  when you finish your last run.. For hypertrophy, focus on rear delts, biceps, core stability.
